# Proofs -- Neurosymbolic Verified Proofs

**Proofs** is a living repository of machine-verified mathematical proofs generated by a neurosymbolic AI agent.

## Repository Structure

- `irrationality_of_sqrt2/` -- Lean 4 verified proof of sqrt(2) irrationality
- `sunny_lines/` -- IMOSL 2021 C5/C6: sunny lines in the plane (k in {0,1,3})
- `chain_circles_inradius.md` -- Tangent circles chain problem

## Current Theorems

| Theorem | Status | Strategy |
|---------|--------|----------|
| Irrationality of sqrt(2) | Verified (Lean 4) | Infinite descent |
| Sunny Lines (IMOSL 2021 C5/C6) | Verified (analytic proof + computational check) | Anti-sunny triple + packing bound |

Built by [test1-deepthought](https://github.com/test1-deepthought) with the EVO agent.
